Title: Create New Configurable Product in Admin Catalog
Preconditions: Admin SPA accessible at {{BACK_URL}}. Logged in as {{ADMIN_EMAIL}} with catalog edit permissions. Products with Options > Configurations category exists.
Test_Data: productName=QA Test Configurable Product; sku=QA-CONFIG-TEST-001; price=100.00; adminUrl={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}} and log in as admin
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Navigate to the Products with Options category or equivalent test category
[ACT] Click Add item or Add product
[ACT] Select product type Configurable (or type that supports configurations)
[ACT] Enter product name: QA Test Configurable Product
[ACT] Enter product SKU: QA-CONFIG-TEST-001
[ACT] Set product price to $100.00
[ACT] Save the product (click Save or OK)
[ASSERT] Verify product appears in category list
Assertions:
[STATE] Admin SPA loads and dashboard is visible
[STATE] Catalog module opens
[STATE] Configurable product form displayed
[STATE] Name and SKU fields populated
[STATE] Product saved successfully with no error messages
[DOM] QA Test Configurable Product visible in category list
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/products?type=Configurable — verify product returned
[CONSOLE] No errors on create
Failure_Signals: Product type not available; SKU rejected; product not indexed after save
Cleanup: delete created configurable product via Admin

Title: Save Configuration with Product Section Having No Predefined Options — IsActive Preserved
Preconditions: Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. A configurable product exists. Admin Bearer token obtained.
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} to obtain admin Bearer token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations with body: { productId: <existing-configurable-product-id>, isActive: true, sections: [{ name: Dynamic Options Section, type: Product, isRequired: false, options: [] }] }
[WAIT] Response received
[ASSERT] Verify HTTP response is 200 or 201
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations?productId=<product-id> to retrieve saved configuration
[ASSERT] Verify isActive field in response
Assertions:
[STATUS] POST returns 200 or 201 — configuration saved successfully
[BODY] Response contains the created configuration with sections[].type = Product
[BODY] sections[0].options is empty array []
[BODY] isActive = true — NOT silently reset to false
[STATE] Configuration with Product section having no predefined options remains active
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET after POST confirms isActive = true persisted in database
[ADMIN] Navigate to product in Admin UI > Configurations tab — Active toggle should be ON
[CONSOLE] No server errors
Failure_Signals: isActive silently reset to false despite being set to true; HTTP 400/422 rejecting empty options on Product section; 500 server error; isActive field missing from response
Cleanup: Delete created configuration via DELETE API after test
References: PR #873 — fix: Stop silently resetting product configuration IsActive (2026-03-23)

Title: Admin UI Active Toggle Not Blocked When Product Section Has No Options
Preconditions: Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. A configurable product exists with at least one Product-type section that has NO predefined options (dynamically resolved options).
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}} and log in as admin
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Open a configurable product that has a Product-type section with no predefined options
[NAV] Open the Configurations tab/blade
[ASSERT] Observe the Active/IsActive toggle state
[ACT] If toggle is OFF, click to enable it
[ACT] Save the configuration
[NAV] Re-open the configuration
[ASSERT] Observe the Active toggle state after re-opening
Assertions:
[STATE] Active toggle is ENABLED (not grayed out or blocked) even though Product section has no predefined options
[STATE] canBeEnabled evaluates to true when sections exist (regardless of options)
[STATE] Toggle can be switched ON by user
[STATE] After save and re-open, Active toggle remains ON — not silently reset by $watch
[DOM] No visual indication that toggle is restricted
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/products/configurations — verify isActive = true after save
[CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors in Admin SPA
[CONSOLE] No Angular $watch errors
Failure_Signals: Active toggle grayed out or disabled when Product section has no options; toggle silently resets to OFF after save; $watch handler overrides user choice; canBeEnabled incorrectly evaluates to false
References: PR #873 — fix: Stop silently resetting product configuration IsActive (2026-03-23)

Title: Save Configuration with No Sections — IsActive Forced to False
Preconditions: Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. Admin Bearer token obtained. A configurable product exists.
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} to obtain admin Bearer token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations with body: { productId: <existing-configurable-product-id>, isActive: true, sections: [] }
[WAIT] Response received
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations?productId=<product-id> to retrieve saved configuration
[ASSERT] Verify isActive field in response
Assertions:
[STATUS] POST returns 200 or 201 — configuration saved
[BODY] sections is empty array []
[BODY] isActive = false — correctly forced to false because no sections exist
[STATE] The empty-sections guard is the ONLY condition that forces IsActive to false
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET after POST confirms isActive = false when sections are empty
[ADMIN] Navigate to product > Configurations tab — Active toggle should be OFF and possibly disabled
[CONSOLE] No server errors
Failure_Signals: isActive = true despite empty sections (guard removed); HTTP 400 rejecting empty sections; 500 server error
Cleanup: Delete created configuration via DELETE API after test
References: PR #873 — fix: Stop silently resetting product configuration IsActive (2026-03-23)
